title: 💳 Plans & Billing
upgrade_success: ✅ Upgrade successful! Your new seats are now active.
upgrade_cancelled: ❌ Upgrade cancelled. No charges were made.
seats_blurb_1: Add cashier and inventory staff to your shop at £5/seat/month. Each seat lets one staff member log in to
seats_blurb_2: via email or WhatsApp OTP on their own phone. The owner dashboard is always included — seats are for additional staff only.
